DEFENDANT BERNARD VASH APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. MR. VASH REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT HE RETAINED A BANKRUPTCY LAWYER AND INTENDS TO FILE FOR BANKRUPTCY. PLAINTIFF IS AMENABLE TO THE CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT CONTINUES THE TRIAL DATE TO 10/31/16 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
